name: stackiq-plugin
description: StackIQ: weekly AI/SaaS utilization diagnostic. A 5-stage read-then-act pipeline (orchestrator, intake, diagnostic, insight, action) that audits tool spend and adoption, finds idle seats, tier mismatches, overlap and shadow-IT, sizes each finding in dollars/seats/accounts, ships an Excel workbook + CEO deck, then executes approved remediations behind a hard human-approval gate. MCP-first, file/Chrome fallback. No API keys.
